name: Leverage written quote
moveTemplate: Can you beat the written quote of ${{competingTotal}}?

name: Leverage price match
moveTemplate: Can you match the competing quote of ${{competingTotal}}?

name: Leverage lower offer
moveTemplate: Can you improve on the other quote of ${{competingTotal}}?

name: Leverage all in comparison
moveTemplate: Can you beat the all-in quote of ${{competingTotal}}?

name: Leverage fee comparison
moveTemplate: Can you match the quote that includes all fees?

name: Leverage scope comparison
moveTemplate: Can you match the competing quote for this scope?

name: Leverage target total
moveTemplate: Can you meet a total near ${{targetTotal}} based on my quote?

name: Leverage recurring quote
moveTemplate: Can you beat the recurring quote of ${{competingTotal}}?

name: Leverage move out quote
moveTemplate: Can you improve on the move-out quote of ${{competingTotal}}?
